name: Eggs Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Thinly slice shelled eggs.
2. Brown almonds in margarine until golden brown. Remove and drain on absorbent paper.
3. In the same pan, saute onion and celery until golden. Stir in arrowroot, salt, and curry powder.
4. Slowly stir in milk. Cook, stirring constantly, until thick and smooth.
5. Add sliced eggs and heat to a boil.
6. Place a slice of toast in the bottom of each of four individual casseroles.
7. Divide eggs evenly over the toast and sprinkle with almonds.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 BREAD/STARCH EXCHANGE + 1 1/2 MEDIUM-FAT EXCHANGES + 1/2 FAT EXCHANGE + 1/2 NONFAT MILK EXCHANGE + 1/2 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE CAL: 275
Source: Recipes for Diabetics by Billi Little (1985 version) Brought to you and yours via Nancy O'Brion and her Meal-Master. NOTE: Egg substitute could be used with.
